title: GLM-5.2 表现接近 Opus 4.8/GPT-5.5
full_text:
After using GLM-5.2 for a day, I’m surprised by how often it feels close to Opus 4.8/GPT-5.5 level.
I compared it side by side with Opus 4.8, and sometimes I even preferred GLM-5.2’s results.
OSS LLMs are impressive, especially given how many fewer GPUs they were trained on.
